feed.title: Mina Kwon
feed.subtitle: This is a personal webpage of Mina Kwon

entry.title: Poster presentation at 2022 SOBP
entry.content:
I gave a poster presentation at 2022 SOBP, titled “Daily Caffeinated Soda Intake in Children is associated With Neurocognitive Vulnerabilities of Substance Misuse and Predicts Greater Alcohol Use in 12 Months.”

Check out the abstract here!
This project is based on the ABCD study, and you could see more details in the preprint.


This was my first time attending the in-person conference abroad!
I had such a meaningful time introducing my research, dicussing my other projects, interacting with researchers working in various places and learning their works!
entry.summary: I gave a poster presentation at 2022 SOBP, titled “Daily Caffeinated Soda Intake in Children is associated With Neurocognitive Vulnerabilities of Substance Misuse and Predicts Greater Alcohol Use in 12 Months.”

entry.title: Megazone Tech Talk
entry.content:
After giving a poster presentation at 2021 AI retreat, I was invited to give a talk at Megazone Tech Talk!

I gave a talk on my master theis, “Identifying unique neurocognitive mechanisms of food addiction and binge eating using longitudinal study design and computational modeling”
It was a great opportunity to introduce my research, and also get to know about Megazone. They are not only providing cloud service. I felt like they are providing AI-based consultation to other industries, such as wine recommendation system, or showing the influence of blankpink on YG entertainment’s building by aggregating all types of SNS around the world. Interesting!!
entry.summary: After giving a poster presentation at 2021 AI retreat, I was invited to give a talk at Megazone Tech Talk! I gave a talk on my master theis, “Identifying unique neurocognitive mechanisms of food addiction and binge eating using longitudinal study design and computational modeling” It was a great opportunity to introduce my research, and also get to know about Megazone. They are not only providing cloud service. I felt like they are providing AI-based consultation to other industries, such as wine recommendation system, or showing the influence of blankpink on YG entertainment’s building by aggregating all types of SNS around the world. Interesting!!

entry.title: Poster presentation at AI retreat
entry.content:
I gave a poster presentation at 2021 AI retreat held by Artificial Intelligence Institute, Seoul National University.

The conferenece was held in-person, finally! It has been almost 2 years since the last in-person conference. Presenting my research to people in other fields, and talking with people from industries (Naver Clova, Megazone, Kakao etc) were such a great opportunity to expand my field of view :)
entry.summary: I gave a poster presentation at 2021 AI retreat held by Artificial Intelligence Institute, Seoul National University.

entry.title: Poster presentation at SfN 2021
entry.content:
I presented my thesis work, “Identifying unique neurocognitive mechanisms of food addiction and binge eating using longitudinal study design and computational modeling” in 2021 Society for Neuroscience (SfN) Annual Meeting. I orignially planned to attend in-person meeting, but it has been canceled due to the COVID-19 :(
However, I enjoyed the discussions with our group members, sharing our researches and motivaion via virtual poster session! :)
If you have registered for 2021 SfN, please checkout the poster session! You could check my posters and also 5 min recordings (Day two, P778 - Modeling and Behavior III #03)
entry.summary: I presented my thesis work, “Identifying unique neurocognitive mechanisms of food addiction and binge eating using longitudinal study design and computational modeling” in 2021 Society for Neuroscience (SfN) Annual Meeting. I orignially planned to attend in-person meeting, but it has been canceled due to the COVID-19 :( However, I enjoyed the discussions with our group members, sharing our researches and motivaion via virtual poster session! :) If you have registered for 2021 SfN, please checkout the poster session! You could check my posters and also 5 min recordings (Day two, P778 - Modeling and Behavior III #03)

entry.title: Commencement :)
entry.content:
I received a Master’s degree in Clinical Psychology from Seoul National University :)
Great thanks to my family!!
I’m now starting my Ph.D :)
entry.summary: I received a Master’s degree in Clinical Psychology from Seoul National University :) Great thanks to my family!! I’m now starting my Ph.D :)

entry.title: Got admission to PhD program
entry.content:
I got admission to Ph.D. program at the Department of Psychology, Seoul National University.
I’m grateful that I could work/study/conduct research in my lab for 3 more years and continue my research projects :)
Wish and believe that my Ph.D. program will be an invaluable opportunity for my personal and academic growth.
entry.summary: I got admission to Ph.D. program at the Department of Psychology, Seoul National University. I’m grateful that I could work/study/conduct research in my lab for 3 more years and continue my research projects :) Wish and believe that my Ph.D. program will be an invaluable opportunity for my personal and academic growth.

entry.title: Just finished the thesis defense on my master’s degree!

link.title: Just finished the thesis defense on my master's degree!

entry.content: Today, I got approval on my master’s degree :)
entry.summary: Today, I got approval on my master’s degree :)

entry.title: Qualifying exam for master’s degree
entry.content:
I just passed the thesis qualification test :) One step completed toward graduation!
I wrote a short (10 pages) essay on decision-making related to food addiction.
Enjoyed doing a literature search on my research interest, and finding the literature gap & coming with a new research idea!
entry.summary: I just passed the thesis qualification test :) One step completed toward graduation! I wrote a short (10 pages) essay on decision-making related to food addiction. Enjoyed doing a literature search on my research interest, and finding the literature gap & coming with a new research idea!

entry.title: Workshop for Motivational Interviewing
entry.content:
I took the workshop for Motivational Interviewing by Prof. Sung-Man Shin.
The lecture addressed ‘motivation’ based on the self-determination theory by Richard Ryan & Edward Deci.
It was interesting that the theory defines an intrinsic motivation as a combination of autonomy, belonging, competence, and a sense of goal.
After learning these theoretical backgrounds, we could practice motivation interviewing in the practice session.
I tried the role of a counselor, and I practiced the OARS techniques (Open questions, Affirming, Reflection, and Summarizing).
I look forward to applying what I’ve learned in this workshop at the 1:1 counseling session that I’m going to do in the On-campus counseling center :)
entry.summary: I took the workshop for Motivational Interviewing by Prof. Sung-Man Shin. The lecture addressed ‘motivation’ based on the self-determination theory by Richard Ryan & Edward Deci. It was interesting that the theory defines an intrinsic motivation as a combination of autonomy, belonging, competence, and a sense of goal. After learning these theoretical backgrounds, we could practice motivation interviewing in the practice session. I tried the role of a counselor, and I practiced the OARS techniques (Open questions, Affirming, Reflection, and Summarizing). I look forward to applying what I’ve learned in this workshop at the 1:1 counseling session that I’m going to do in the On-campus counseling center :)

entry.title: Workshop for Evidence based trauma treatment

link.title: Workshop for Evidence based trauma treatment

entry.content:
I took the workshop for Evidence-based trauma treament held by Dr. Hye Sun Joo in Korea Trauma Research & Education Institute.
The lecture first addressed real examples of PTSD patients, and then discussed how to respond in certain situations with specific exampels.
Since I’ve never experienced PTSD patients before, this workshop will be helpful for me to work as a counselor at the on-campus counseling center.
entry.summary: I took the workshop for Evidence-based trauma treament held by Dr. Hye Sun Joo in Korea Trauma Research & Education Institute. The lecture first addressed real examples of PTSD patients, and then discussed how to respond in certain situations with specific exampels. Since I’ve never experienced PTSD patients before, this workshop will be helpful for me to work as a counselor at the on-campus counseling center.
